title: The Forgotten Observatory
description: An abandoned observatory contains star charts written in a language only a dedicated scholar would recognize. One final calculation remains unfinished.

options.title: Finish the Calculation
options.description: Complete the lost scholar's work and share the discovery.

options.title: Sell the Star Charts
options.description: Collectors will pay dearly for knowledge they cannot read.

options.title: Preserve the Observatory
options.description: Seal the doors until the knowledge can be studied responsibly.
